{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Senator Cyclon
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Cyclon]] is a senator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Cyclon]] is a senator being challenged by [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“I challenge Senators Gorgol and Cyclon at once,” Varic said.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
